title: athyrium quelpartense
intro: Athyrium quelpartense, also known as Korean lady fern, is a species of fern native to the Korean Peninsula. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The health benefits of Athyrium quelpartense include its potential to reduce the risk of heart disease, improve cognitive function, and boost the immune system. Athyrium quelpartense can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
